articles.title: A grad student’s wild idea sparks a major aging breakthrough
articles.description: A casual conversation between graduate students helped spark a breakthrough in aging research at Mayo Clinic. Researchers discovered that tiny synthetic DNA molecules called aptamers can selectively attach to senescent “zombie cells,” which are linked to aging, cancer, and neurodegenerative disease. The method could eventually help scientists identify and target these cells in living tissue with far greater precision.

Investigators uncovered evidence of a "guess paper" with numerous questions closely matching the actual exam, prompting a CBI probe into the matter.

articles.title: A 47-year study reveals when strength and fitness start to fade
articles.description: A groundbreaking Swedish study that tracked people for nearly 50 years has revealed when the body’s physical decline quietly begins. Researchers found that fitness, strength, and muscle endurance start slipping around age 35, with the decline accelerating over time. But there’s an encouraging twist: adults who became active later in life still improved their physical performance by up to 10 percent.

articles.title: 'Peace can't be piecemeal': India voices concern over Strait of Hormuz, Gaza at BRICS conclave

Jaishankar urged BRICS nations to find practical solutions to geopolitical crises, emphasizing the threat to global energy and economic security from West Asian tensions. He stressed dialogue, diplomacy, and respect for sovereignty, while also highlighting concerns over unilateral sanctions, terrorism, and the need for UN Security Council reform.

Huang, who is in Beijing as part of Donald Trump’s state visit to China, seemed perfectly content relishing the local staple right on the sidewalk. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: What's Really Going on in Bond Markets?: 3-Minutes MLIV (Video)
articles.description: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Paul Dobson break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Delhi HC asks CCI to not pass any final order on probe against Apple
articles.description: The direction came after Apple’s lawyer AM Singhvi informed the court that although its petition was listed for hearing on July 15, the CCI had issued a notice scheduling a final hearing on May 21

articles.title: PM Modi in UAE: MoU on strategic petroleum reserves, LPG supply signed amid Iran war crisis
articles.description: PM Modi in UAE: PM Modi's short visit to Abu Dhabi comes as a chance for India shore up energy supplies from the UAE and to discuss the welfare of the four-million-strong diaspora in the Emirates amid the impact on fuel supply due to Iran war.

articles.title: Scientists identify massive new dinosaur following Thailand dig
articles.description: Nagatitan chaiyaphumensis had enough unique features to be considered a new species.

articles.title: Why SocGen's Albert Edwards Sees Double-Digit Inflation Coming Back
articles.description: A conversation with the famed uber-bear.

articles.title: Odd Lots: Albert Edwards Believes Inflation Will Surge (Podcast)
articles.description: Making a long career as a bear at a sell-side institution is tough. Generally financial markets have done quite well which means forecasting doom and gloom is, usually, only tenable for so long. Which is why we wanted to talk to one of the most successful bears out there. Société Générale has let Albert Edwards out of the bear cage for today’s episode. Edwards knows his reputation as a bear is well deserved: He believes, among other things, double-digit inflation is in the offing. We also talk a

articles.title: Africa's top health body confirms new Ebola outbreak in remote Congo province
articles.description: Africa CDC, the continent's top public health body, on Friday confirmed a new Ebola outbreak in Congo's remote Ituri province, with 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths recorded so far.

topStories.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Spotted Eating Noodles on Beijing Sidewalk During Trump Visit
topStories.description:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang was spotted eating Beijing’s famous fried bean sauce noodles.

Huang, who is in Beijing as part of Donald Trump’s state visit to China, seemed perfectly content relishing the local staple right on the sidewalk. (Source: Bloomberg)

topStories.title: RBC's Calvasina Says US Industrials 'A Bit Overvalued'
topStories.description: Lori Calvasina, head of US equity strategy at RBC, says "everybody loves industrials in the US," but warns of the sector being "a bit" overvalued. She speaks on Bloomberg Television.  (Source: Bloomberg)

topStories.title: PM Modi's plane escorted by F-16 fighter jets in UAE airspace; BJP shares clip | WATCH
topStories.description: PM Modi arrived in the UAE this afternoon, marking the beginning of a five-nation visit that comes amid the ongoing Iran-US war.

topStories.title: Seized ship taken toward Iran as Trump and Xi agree on Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: A ship was taken by unknown parties toward Iranian waters after an Indian-flagged vessel was attacked off Oman.

topStories.title: CIA chief makes historic trip to Cuba as US blockade chokes island's energy supplies
topStories.description: The U.S. has been restricting oil shipments to Cuba since January, plunging the country into blackouts lasting days at a time.

topStories.title: When Trump met Xi as peers
topStories.description: The image of two superpowers on similar footing was exactly what Chinese President Xi Jinping aimed to achieve with the visit, analysts said.

topStories.title: Trump’s and Xi’s Body Language at the Summit Mirrored Their Styles
topStories.description: Although at odds over issues like trade and Taiwan, the U.S. and Chinese leaders met in Beijing with a show of friendly gestures.

topStories.title: For Trump in China, a tonal shift yields few results
topStories.description: Trump's homage and deference to Xi were a striking display of an often commanding president adapting to a new power dynamic, understanding China's rise and its emerging role in the world.

topStories.title: Nvidia’s Future in China Remains Unclear After Trump-Xi Summit
topStories.description: The standoff comes as Chinese firms increasingly turn to domestic chipmakers like Huawei, in a drive to reduce China’s dependence on Western technologies.

topStories.title: Trump touts "fantastic trade deals" with Xi as Beijing summit ends
topStories.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping concluded their summit in Beijing on Friday with both countries looking to claim the visit as a win.

topStories.title: Who is Dr Ketan Bhatikar, the Goa Congress leader who died of a snake bite?
topStories.description: Dr Ketan Bhatikar, renowned physiotherapist, was the Congress candidate for the Ponda by-election, which was cancelled following a high court verdict. He had moved the Supreme Court against the HC order through a Special Leave Petition, which is pending before the apex court.

topStories.title: Trump Announces Boeing Jet Order From China. Beijing Stays Silent.
topStories.description: The deal, if it materializes, would be a major win for Boeing, which has lost ground to Airbus in one of the world’s largest aviation markets.

dailyNews.title: China to buy U.S. oil to feed its 'insatiable appetite,' Trump tells Fox News
dailyNews.description: Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping are scheduled to meet Friday to close out a two-day summit that has featured pageantry and dealmaking.

dailyNews.title: Oklahoma becomes latest state to sue Roblox over child safety concerns
dailyNews.description: Oklahoma has filed a lawsuit against Roblox, making it the latest state to take legal action against the popular gaming platform over child safety concerns.

dailyNews.title: Trump and Xi end 2nd round of talks in high-stakes summit
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping have concluded their second round of talks as Trump heads back to the U.S.

dailyNews.title: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Raul Castro's grandson in Havana, US and Cuban officials say
dailyNews.description: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Cuban officials including Raúl Castro's grandson during a high-level visit to the island Thursday, Cuban and U.S. officials said.

dailyNews.title: Compromised PM didn't sign trade deal with U.S., but a bargain for Adani's release: Rahul
dailyNews.description: Hopelessly one-sided Indo-U.S. trade deal that was really a steal by the U.S., says Congress leader Jairam Ramesh in a post on X.

dailyNews.title: Trump wraps up two-day China trip; invites Xi for a September visit
Will lead to further inflation, growth estimates will be lowered considerably: Congress on fuel hike
Trump touts ‘fantastic trade deals’ in final Xi meeting amid tariff standoff
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump touts an incredible visit and fantastic trade deals with China after his final meeting with Xi, as Beijing agrees to order 200 Boeing jets.

dailyNews.title: Texas man executed for retired professor's killing
dailyNews.description: Texas man who experts said was intellectually disabled is executed for retired professor's killing

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Xi, says ‘wonderful things’ done during China summit
dailyNews.description: President Trump thanked President Xi during remarks on the second day of the U.S.-China summit. He said a lot of problems were settled during talks and indicated that the two leaders share similar feelings about wanting the war with Iran to end.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Xi’s stance on arming Iran as Hormuz tensions rattle markets
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says Chinese President Xi Jinping pledged not to supply Iran with military equipment, calling it a major win from the bilateral summit.

dailyNews.title: Billionaire Gautam Adani and nephew agree to pay $18 million in SEC settlement over fraud allegations
dailyNews.description: Indian billionaire Gautam Adani and his nephew Sagar Adani have agreed to settle a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission lawsuit over allegations they misled investors.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Xi, says ‘wonderful things’ done during China summit
dailyNews.description: President Trump thanked President Xi during remarks on the second day of the U.S.-China summit. He said a lot of problems were settled during talks and indicated that the two leaders share similar feelings about wanting the war with Iran to end.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Xi’s stance on arming Iran as Hormuz tensions rattle markets
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says Chinese President Xi Jinping pledged not to supply Iran with military equipment, calling it a major win from the bilateral summit.

dailyNews.title: Trump and Kennedy seek to relax safeguards for AI health care tools
dailyNews.description: Paul Boyer, a psychotherapist for Kaiser Permanente in Oakland, California, is experiencing the AI revolution firsthand. He's a little underwhelmed. The health giant has rolled out a new suite of note-taking software, made by health care AI pioneer Abridge, intended to summarize a patient's visit at supersonic speed. For many clinicians, the technology soothes one of the persistent headaches of their lives—administration and paperwork.

dailyNews.title: Why are so many U.S. CEOs in China with Trump, and what do they want?
dailyNews.description: More than a dozen American CEOs are accompanying President Trump on his trip to China. That's not unusual.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices jumps after Trump says China agreed to buy U.S. crude following Xi talks
dailyNews.description: Oil prices rise Friday on news that China has agreed to purchase oil from America

dailyNews.title: Trump says Xi agreed US became a ‘declining nation’ during Biden years
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump turns Xi Jinping's apparent swipe at Western decline into an attack on Biden, saying the U.S. "suffered immeasurably" under the prior administration.

dailyNews.title: McMaster revives Trump-backed push to oust Biden kingmaker from Congress
dailyNews.description: Gov. Henry McMaster calls South Carolina special legislative session on redistricting amid GOP infighting and Trump pressure to oust Rep. Clyburn.

dailyNews.title: What U.S. and China want out of talks between Trump and Xi
dailyNews.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping and President Trump are discussing a wide range of topics in Beijing, including Taiwan and the war with Iran. Henrietta Levin, a senior fellow with the Freeman Chair in China Studies at CSIS, joins "The Daily Report" to discuss what success would look like for both the U.S. and China during these talks.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Lou Correa says "we owe it to our veterans" to research psychedelic drug therapies
dailyNews.description: In April, President Trump signed an executive order that speeds up research and increases funding for psychedelic drug therapies. Democratic Rep. Lou Correa of California, who is leading a bipartisan effort to advance these therapies, joins "The Takeout" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Families of Americans imprisoned in China appeal to Trump for help
dailyNews.description: After living without their loved ones for more than a decade, two families of Americans detained in China are appealing to President Donald Trump to bring them home as he meets with Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing.

dailyNews.title: China and U.S. agree Hormuz shouldn’t be ‘militarized,’ Marco Rubio says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump discussed the Iran war and the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz during a summit with President Xi Jinping, Secretary of State Marco Rubio told NBC News in an interview Thursday.

dailyNews.title: CIA director travels to Havana to meet with Cuban officials
dailyNews.description: CIA Director John Ratcliffe traveled to Cuba to "personally deliver President Trump's message" to Cuban leaders that the United States is ready to engage in discussions on economic and security issues.
